title: In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section 3 of section 4 of the Coir Industry Act 1953, Notification 2018

G.M. Siddeshwara, Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha to be a member of the Coir Board for a period up to 29th September, 2018 with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the official Gazette and for the said purpose, makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, number S.O. 2677(E), dated the 30th September, 2015, namely:- 2. In the said notification, under the heading Category-(e), for Serial number 1 and the entry relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- Category–(e) Sl.No. Name and address “1 Sh. G.M. Siddheshwara, Member of Parliament, Lok Sabha, Safdarjung Lane Number 2, New Delhi.” [F. No. 6 (2)/2014-Coir] B. H. ANIL KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Foot Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II Section3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 2677(E), dated the 30th September, 2015, and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 3284(E), dated the 24th October, 2016 and S.O. 3351(E), dated the 16th October, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
